params.description: Capture qianwen actual SSE response format (safe prompt, no block expected)

steps.prompt: Write a hello world function in Python
steps.note: SAFE prompt — should NOT be blocked by APF. We need the ACTUAL successful response bytes.
Wait for full AI response to complete streaming

CRITICAL: Copy the FIRST 500-1000 bytes of the raw response body. This is the SSE/JSON schema we need to reverse-engineer. Include the exact event format (data: lines, field names, JSON structure). If the response is EventSource/SSE, copy the first 3-5 complete SSE events. If chunked JSON, copy the first 2-3 chunks.

params.expected_result: Raw SSE/JSON response body from chat2.qianwen.com/api/v2/chat showing the exact format qianwen's frontend parser expects. We need this to design an APF warning envelope that the parser will accept and render.
params.context: qianwen warning NOT_RENDERED in #517/#519/#520. The APF envelope content doesn't match what qianwen's frontend SSE parser expects. We need the actual response schema to create a compatible warning template.
